name: agent-pitfalls
description: Gemini CLI extension — 即时查询 AI agent 避坑知识

pitfall.prompt: Run: agent-pitfalls search "$ARGUMENTS" --no-color — return top 3 most relevant pitfalls as: title, severity, symptoms, root_causes, fixes, references.

pitfall-check.prompt: Run: agent-pitfalls check ${ARGUMENTS:-.} --no-color — list each issue with rule_id, file:line, snippet, and the related pitfall from the knowledge base.
